Imports

../support/cookie, ../network/http/webserver

Procs

proc getAgent(req: var Request): Option[string] {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Retrieves the user agent from request header 
proc getBrowserName(req: var Request): Option[string] {....raises: [KeyError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Retrieves the browser name from sec-ch-ua header https://wicg.github.io/ua-client-hints/#sec-ch-ua 
proc getClientData(req: var Request): JsonNode {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the client data from the request 
proc getCookies(req: var Request): Option[string] {....raises: [KeyError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns Cookies header from Request 
proc getHttpMethod(req: var Request): HttpMethod {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the HttpMethod from Request 
proc getPlatform(req: var Request): Option[string] {....raises: [KeyError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Return the platform name, It can be one of the following common platform values: Android, Chrome OS, iOS, Linux, macOS, Windows, or Unknown. https://wicg.github.io/ua-client-hints/#sec-ch-ua-platform 
proc getUriPath(req: Request): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns Uri path from Request 
proc getUrl(req: Request): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns a string Uri from Request 
proc hasCookies(req: var Request): bool {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Check if Request contains Cookies header

Exports

Request, send, send, send, send, getIp, getHeaders, getHeader, findHeader, $, getQuery, getBody
